name: Creatine monohydrate
summary: Decision-ready summary: Creatine monohydrate is best framed for strength and power output; lean mass support; cognitive fatigue resistance; safety screen: advanced kidney disease; active renal monitoring concerns.
description: Creatine monohydrate supports strength; muscle; cognitive fatigue with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated; use caution in advanced kidney disease or when renal status is medically unstable.
contraindications: Pre-existing kidney disease or renal impairment warrants clinician guidance before use
adequate hydration is required since creatine draws water into muscle cells
caution with other nephrotoxic drugs or supplements such as chronic NSAID use
mild GI upset such as bloating or cramping at high doses.
